identityAppId.descr: Identity app id; 0 = deferred (owner resolved from local registry).

methods.name: initialize
methods.desc: Set the Identity registry app id (0 keeps the owner guards on the local registry).

methods.name: setAgentOwner
methods.desc:
DEV/TEST seam (deferred identity): register an agent's owner locally so the
self-feedback prohibition can be exercised without the Identity app.

methods.name: giveFeedback
methods.desc: giveFeedback (mapping §2.2). Caller MUST NOT be the agent owner (self-feedback prohibition).

methods.name: revokeFeedback
methods.desc: revokeFeedback (mapping §2.2). Caller MUST be the original client — enforced by the key.

methods.name: getSummary
methods.desc: getSummary (mapping §2.2). clientAddresses MUST be non-empty (Sybil guard).
